name: Chicken Salad in Cantaloupe Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cantaloupes into half and remove seeds.
2. Stem and seed bell pepper; finely dice. Cut papaya into halves and discard seed, peel fruit, and cut into about 3/8 inch cubes.
3. Combine diced bell pepper, papaya, chicken, cilantro, and drained capers in a bowl.
4. If making ahead, cover and chill for up to 4 hours.
5. Stir together lime peel, lime juice, and orange juice.
6. Pour the juices over the chicken mixture and stir to blend.
7. Spoon the mixture equally into melon halves; garnish with lime wedges.
8. Add salt and pepper to taste.
